name: Spicy Nuts
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Nuts, Pecans, Almonds, Cashews Or A Mixture
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300°F. In a heavy skillet combine all the ingredients except nuts and simmer for a few minutes, then add the nuts, tossing to coat. Add a little more cayenne or Tabasco sauce if you'd like a spicier nut. Spread nuts on a cookie sheet and bake for 10 minutes. Stir and cook for an additional 5 to 10 minutes. Cool and store in airtight containers or freeze.
Note: Calgary Sun, Monday, November 5, 1990 - Cinda Chavich, Food Editor From "Fresh Chef on the Run" by Olympic athlete Diane Clement.
